entries.name: Asana
entries.description: Official Asana MCP server — manage tasks, projects, and workspaces. OAuth-protected.

entries.name: Linear
entries.description: Official Linear MCP server — issues, projects, and cycles. OAuth-protected.

entries.name: Notion
entries.description: Official Notion MCP server — search, read, and update pages and databases. OAuth-protected.

entries.name: Sentry
entries.description: Official Sentry MCP server — query issues, events, and releases. OAuth-protected.

entries.name: Stripe
entries.description: Official Stripe MCP server — payments, customers, and balances. OAuth-protected.

entries.name: DeepWiki
entries.description: Ask questions about any public GitHub repository's documentation. No auth.

entries.name: Hugging Face
entries.description: Official Hugging Face MCP server — search models, datasets, and Spaces.

entries.name: Swagger Petstore
entries.description: The canonical OpenAPI demo API — a great way to try the REST wizard end to end.

entries.name: Stripe REST API
entries.description: The full Stripe REST API as OpenAPI — payments, customers, subscriptions. Uses a bearer secret key.

entries.name: APIs.guru Directory
entries.description: The APIs.guru directory API itself — list and look up thousands of public OpenAPI specs. No auth.
